user_request: Find references for coffee grinder adjustment mechanisms, grind-size collars, and tactile control interfaces. Prioritize mechanism detail and clear physical interaction.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Minimal, monolithic coffee grinder with a strong tactile wood adjustment knob, matte black body, and compact vertical format emphasizing hand interaction and mechanism visibility.
strengths: Strong tactile contrast between warm wood and matte black body
Mechanism-focused front-facing composition with easy visual reading
Compact, architectural form that feels premium and deliberate
Good fit for coffee equipment reference, especially manual interaction details
weaknesses: Limited visibility of the actual adjustment mechanism details
Overall form is quite minimal and may read as generic to some viewers
No clear indexing marks or interaction cues beyond the knob edge
Image is a product lifestyle shot rather than a technical mechanism close-up
Surface treatment is restrained, with little material complexity beyond black/wood contrast
